name: ai-hub-skill-set
description: Medical-imaging dataset workflow skills: dataset-acquisition, dicom-converter, nnunet-converter. Progressive-disclosure SKILL.md files with mandatory MUST-read pointers, plus working helper scripts (DICOM auditor, SOP-UID map writer, multi-RTSTRUCT union parser, GDC manifest, HF revision-pinned downloader, simple nnUNet CLI, provenance manifest writer).
